highlights.headline: Philadelphia 76ers vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Philadelphia 76ers vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/02/25 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Joel Embiid had 27 points in his return to the lineup after missing five games with right shin soreness and right knee injury management, Tyrese Maxey scored 32 points, and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Indiana Pacers 135-114 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maxey, Embiid lead 76ers to 135-114 rout of Pacers

headlines.description: — Jonathan Kuminga scored a season-high 27 points in his debut for the Hawks, who blew out the hapless Washington Wizards 119-98 Tuesday night in Trae Young's return to Atlanta.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kuminga steals the show in Young's return to Atlanta, leading Hawks past Wizards 119-98

headlines.description: — Marvin Bagley III scored 22 points, Naji Marshall had 21 and the Dallas Mavericks beat the Brooklyn Nets 123-114 on Tuesday night after both teams arrived in New York earlier in the day.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mavericks beat the Nets 123-114 after both teams arrive on game day because of the blizzard

headlines.description: — Zion Williamson scored 26 points, Dejounte Murray added 13 in his first game in nearly 13 months, and the New Orleans Pelicans beat the injury-depleted Golden State Warriors 113-109 on Tuesday night.
